title: 菊花賞の後に・現実は

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No... I can't stop here... I can't!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm a... first-rate...

text_block_list.name: Excited Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Man, that was an awesome race! I finally got to
see Seiun Sky and Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Excited Spectator
text_block_list.text: They were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fidgety Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I bet they'll go to the spring Tenno Sho,
right? Or we might even see them at the Arima
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Fidgety Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I'm really looking forward to seeing
what they'll do next year! They both definitely
have my support!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so stupid.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Not a single person is looking my way.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Maybe I was wrong. Maybe I shouldn't have tried.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What a disgrace...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In the end, my mother was right.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I couldn't take center stage. I wasn't even close.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm not first-rate at all...
choice_data_list: You're King Halo, the first-rate Umamusume!
You're King Halo, the first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Stop it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't be stubborn and look at the reality! I'm...
I'm not...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...K-Kawakami? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I came to support you! You were really wonderful
out there!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Your powerful strides, your bursts of speed... And
above all...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
How you keep running with that beautiful posture
no matter what! I just love watching you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...K-Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
King! Great job out there! You really completed
the Triple Crown tour!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You were so awesome! I'm gonna do my best so I
can run the Triple Crown someday too!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You all saw me...
choice_data_list: People were looking your way, after all.
People were looking your way, after all.

text_block_list.text: Even with this loss, eyes are still on King Halo.
choice_data_list:
I know because I've been watching you this
whole time.

I know because I've been watching you this
whole time.

text_block_list.text:
No matter how frustrating things may be, no
matter how shocked by her people may become...

Even if her achievements don't satisfy her
mother...

Even if life throws her countless heartbreaking
moments, she will rise and push on. She is a
tenacious Umamusume who deserves to be
admired.

Her talent and charm are completely different
from her mother. It's what makes her unique.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Are you mocking me by continuing to
repeat that?
choice_data_list: I'll say it again and again—you're first-rate.
I'll say it again and again—you're first-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I swear! I just can't with you!
choice_data_list:
(I can't help it... You've got me charmed as
well.)

(I can't help it... You've got me charmed as
well.)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Dummy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're such a dummy! At times like this, you're
supposed to lecture me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Instead, you're just hardheaded, stubborn, and
clumsy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And above all, you're too lenient!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Seriously... It's not classy at all...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why... Why are we both such fools?
I lend her my shoulder until her tears stop.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Before the Kikuka Sho, there was something you
were trying to tell me, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Well, you can say it now.

But she's not the same as her mother. There are
different places where her potential can shine.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to hear it.
She looks at me intensely, waiting.
choice_data_list: Stop trying to get your mother's attention.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's what you want me to stop?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're not going to tell me to quit running long
distances?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're not going say stop running races I can't
win and focus on what I'm good at?
choice_data_list: No. I want you to be first-rate in your own way.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In my own way...

King Halo shouldn't be trying to follow in
someone else's footsteps, and she shouldn't be
chasing after anyone's approval.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? Is it really okay for me to do things
how I want?

Her path shouldn't be influenced by her mother or
anyone else.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't be first-rate for anyone else's sake. I
should be first-rate for myself...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're right.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I like the sound of that.
